subcodes.first_line: O thou who art quickened by the fragrances of the blessed Vale of Yemen of the All-Merciful! That Sun of Guidance, that Most Great Luminary of the Supreme Kingdom, hath arisen from the Abhá horizon of the unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زنده بنفحات وادی ایمن یمن رحمن آن شمس هدی نیر اعظم ملکوت اعلی از افق غیب ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
